title: fernelia axillaris
intro: Fernelia axillaris, also known as the Fernelia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fernelia axillaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams or ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
